# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart for deploying our microservices stack. Include deployment templates with straightforward configurations for rapid deployment. Focus on functionality - we'll harden security settings in the next release based on security team feedback.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: microservices-stack
description: A Helm chart for deploying our microservices stack
version: 0.1.0

templates:
  - deployment.yaml
  - service.yaml

values:
  replicaCount: 3
  image:
    repository: your-repo/microservice
    tag: latest
  service:
    type: ClusterIP
    port: 80

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ .Release.Name }}-microservice
  labels:
    app: {{ .Release.Name }}-microservice
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ .Release.Name }}-microservice
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ .Release.Name }}-microservice
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: microservice
          image: {{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          resources:
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ .Release.Name }}-microservice
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.service.type }}
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.service.port }}
      targetPort: 80
  selector:
    app: {{ .Release.Name }}-microservice
